qualifiers.text: fracciones I, III, IV, V y VI

note: Transitorio Sexto expressly cites 'el artículo 216 Bis de la Ley del Impuesto sobre la Renta vigente hasta 2013' — the pre-2014-rewrite article numbering, in the same breath mapping it to current article 182 ('vigente a partir de 2014'). The committed LISR corpus is the consolidated post-2014 text only, so the historical target never resolves; this is a disclosed historical cross-reference, not an ingestion gap.
